---

# 🧠 PANDORHA ENGINE: FULL CONTEXT

> This file contains real TypeScript interfaces and key service signatures extracted from the codebase.
> Use as a fast context injection for LLM inference sessions that need precise type information.
> For the architectural map, see `llms.txt`. For RPG math, see `src/shared/game-rules.ts`.

---

## 1. Result Pattern (src/shared/lib/result.ts)

```typescript
export type Result<T, E = string> =
  | { readonly success: true; readonly data: T }
  | { readonly success: false; readonly error: E };

export const ok = <T>(data: T): Result<T, never> =>
  ({ success: true, data } as const);

export const fail = <E>(error: E): Result<never, E> =>
  ({ success: false, error } as const);
```

---

## 2. DiceService (src/shared/dice/DiceService.ts)

```typescript
export interface RollResult {
  readonly total: number;
  readonly rolls: readonly number[];
  readonly sides: number;
  readonly count: number;
  readonly modifier: number;
}

export interface IRng {
  rollDie(sides: number): number;
}

export class DiceService {
  constructor(private readonly rng: IRng) {}

  /** Rola N dados de X lados com modificador. */
  roll(count: number, sides: number, modifier?: number): Result<RollResult, string>;

  /** Rola 1d20 com modificador — usado em Teste Global. */
  rollD20(modifier?: number): Result<RollResult, string>;

  /** Verifica se o valor é Natural 20 (Acerto Crítico). */
  isNaturalCritical(roll: number): boolean;

  /** Verifica se o valor é Natural 1 (Falha Crítica). */
  isNaturalFailure(roll: number): boolean;
}
```

---

## 3. ResolutionService (src/shared/resolution/ResolutionService.ts)

```typescript
export type DegreeOfSuccess =
  | 'CRITICAL_SUCCESS'
  | 'SUCCESS'
  | 'SUCCESS_WITH_COST'
  | 'FAILURE'
  | 'CRITICAL_FAILURE';

export interface ResolutionResult {
  readonly degree: DegreeOfSuccess;
  readonly total: number;
  readonly dc: number;
  readonly roll: RollResult;
}

export class ResolutionService {
  constructor(private readonly dice: DiceService) {}

  /** Executa um Teste Global e retorna o grau de sucesso. */
  resolve(modifier: number, dc: number): Result<ResolutionResult, string>;
}
```

---

## 4. DamagePipelineService (src/shared/damage/DamagePipelineService.ts)

```typescript
export type DamageAffinity = 'RESISTANCE' | 'VULNERABILITY' | 'IMMUNITY' | 'NORMAL';

export interface DamageContext {
  readonly baseRoll: RollResult;
  readonly isCritical: boolean;
  readonly reductionFlat: number;
  readonly affinity: DamageAffinity;
}

export interface DamageResult {
  readonly final: number;
  readonly phases: {
    readonly base: number;
    readonly afterCrit: number;
    readonly afterReduction: number;
    readonly afterAffinity: number;
  };
}

export class DamagePipelineService {
  /** Calcula dano em 4 fases determinísticas. */
  calculate(ctx: DamageContext, dice: DiceService): Result<DamageResult, string>;
}
```

---

## 5. ActionQueueService (src/shared/action-queue/ActionQueueService.ts)

```typescript
export type CommandType =
  | 'ATTACK'
  | 'CAST_SPELL'
  | 'MANEUVER'
  | 'MOVE'
  | 'APPLY_CONDITION'
  | 'END_TURN'
  | 'REACTION';

export interface GameCommand {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly type: CommandType;
  readonly actorId: string;
  readonly payload: Record<string, unknown>;
  readonly isInterrupt: boolean; // true = LIFO (Reaction), false = FIFO (normal)
}

export interface ProcessedCommand {
  readonly command: GameCommand;
  readonly timestamp: number;
}

export class ActionQueueService {
  /** Adiciona comando à fila (FIFO) ou ao topo da pilha de interrupções (LIFO). */
  enqueue(command: GameCommand): Result<void, string>;

  /** Processa o próximo comando da fila usando o processor fornecido. */
  processNext(processor: CommandProcessor): Result<ProcessedCommand, string>;

  /** Retorna todos os comandos pendentes. */
  getPending(): readonly GameCommand[];

  /** Verifica se a fila está vazia. */
  isEmpty(): boolean;
}
```

---

## 6. CharacterService (src/entities/character/domain/CharacterService.ts)

```typescript
export interface Character {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly name: string;
  readonly level: number;
  readonly eixos: { fisico: number; mental: number; social: number };
  readonly aplicacoes: { conflito: number; interacao: number; resistencia: number };
  readonly ancestry: string;
  readonly characterClass: string;
  readonly background: string;
}

export class CharacterService {
  /** Cria personagem validando regra 6/6 dos eixos e aplicações. */
  createCharacter(input: CreateCharacterInput): Result<Character, CharacterError>;

  /** Lista todos os personagens da sessão. */
  listCharacters(): Result<Character[], string>;

  /** Busca personagem por ID. */
  findById(id: string): Result<Character, string>;
}
```

---

## 7. CharacterDerivedStatsService (src/entities/character/domain/CharacterDerivedStatsService.ts)

```typescript
export interface DerivedStats {
  readonly maxHp: number;       // (base_classe + Físico + Resistência) * Nível
  readonly maxEe: number;       // Nível + Mental (varia por classe)
  readonly initiative: number;  // Mental + Conflito + Nível
  readonly carryLimit: number;  // Físico + Resistência + 6
  readonly baseCA: number;      // 10 + Nível + Eixo + Aplicação
}

export class CharacterDerivedStatsService {
  /** Calcula stats derivados sem persistir valores finais. */
  calculate(character: Character): Result<DerivedStats, string>;
}
```

---

## 8. RPCResponse (src/shared/rpc/model/rpcSchemas.ts)

```typescript
import { z } from 'zod';

export const RPCResponseSchema = <T extends z.ZodType>(dataSchema: T) =>
  z.discriminatedUnion('success', [
    z.object({
      success: z.literal(true),
      messageId: z.string().uuid(),
      data: dataSchema,
    }),
    z.object({
      success: z.literal(false),
      messageId: z.string().uuid(),
      error: z.object({
        code: z.string(),    // 'SQLITE_BUSY' | 'VALIDATION_ERROR' | 'RPC_TIMEOUT'
        message: z.string(),
        details: z.unknown().optional(),
      }),
    }),
  ]);

export type RPCResponse<T> = z.infer<ReturnType<typeof RPCResponseSchema<z.ZodType<T>>>>;
```

---

## 9. PANDORHA_RULES Quick Reference (src/shared/game-rules.ts)

```typescript
PANDORHA_RULES.DICE.D20_SIDES          = 20
PANDORHA_RULES.DICE.NATURAL_CRITICAL   = 20
PANDORHA_RULES.DICE.NATURAL_FAILURE    = 1
PANDORHA_RULES.UNIVERSAL_TESTS.BASE_DC              = 10
PANDORHA_RULES.UNIVERSAL_TESTS.CRITICAL_MARGIN      = 10
PANDORHA_RULES.UNIVERSAL_TESTS.CRITICAL_FAIL_MARGIN = 5
PANDORHA_RULES.DAMAGE.CRITICAL_MULTIPLIER   = 2
PANDORHA_RULES.DAMAGE.RESISTANCE_MULTIPLIER = 0.5
PANDORHA_RULES.DAMAGE.IMMUNITY_MULTIPLIER   = 0
PANDORHA_RULES.DAMAGE.MIN_DAMAGE            = 0
PANDORHA_RULES.COMBAT.BASE_CA              = 10
PANDORHA_RULES.COMBAT.BASE_ACTIONS         = 3
PANDORHA_RULES.COMBAT.MAP_PENALTY_1        = -5
PANDORHA_RULES.COMBAT.MAP_PENALTY_2        = -10
PANDORHA_RULES.DEATH.DEATH_SUCCESSES_NEEDED = 3
PANDORHA_RULES.DEATH.DEATH_FAILURES_NEEDED  = 3
PANDORHA_RULES.LOGISTICS.BASE_SLOTS_ADDITION = 6
PANDORHA_RULES.LOGISTICS.OVERLOAD_IMMOBILIZED_THRESHOLD = 5
PANDORHA_RULES.CHARACTER_CREATION.POINTS_EIXOS       = 6
PANDORHA_RULES.CHARACTER_CREATION.POINTS_APLICACOES  = 6
```
